data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes user choice overload by presenting relevant actions.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menu options and focused features.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes touch target sizes for better accessibility and interaction.
data.technical_spec: Adequate padding and easy-to-tap targets particularly in app interfaces.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Chunking content to enhance the memorability and understanding of information.
data.technical_spec: Feed design that breaks content into digestible pieces.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Keeps interface familiar by aligning it with expectations from similar platforms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design patterns and navigational cues similar to other leading apps.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design influences perceptions of usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality visual design and smooth animations.
